text: Network Address Translation (NAT) © tssizeancanaie @ strmne e NAT is designed to overcome IPv4 shortages e ... also provides some security benefits e Translates Private IPv4 addresses to Public e Static NAT - 1 private to 1 (fixed) public address (IGW) e Dynamic NAT - 1 private to 1st available Public * Port Address Translation (PAT) - many private to 1 public (NATGW) e |[Pv4 only ... makes no sense with IPv6
